name: Relevant Gold Corp.
description: Relevant Gold Corp. is an early-stage gold exploration company focused on the acquisition, discovery, and development of district-scale gold projects in Wyoming, USA. The company leverages unique geological research connecting the Wyoming Province to the Abitibi region to identify high-grade gold potential. With over 50,000 acres of mineral rights across five project areas, including Bradley Peak and Golden Buffalo, the company is led by a team of experienced geologists and value creators. Relevant Gold is committed to sustainable exploration in a mining-friendly jurisdiction, utilizing modern data-driven techniques to unlock significant gold resources.
